items.title: Facing the Trail Blazers in the 2nd game of a back-to-back, the #Magic will be without Jase Richardson and Noah Penda.
items.author: Jason Beede
items.body_excerpt:
Facing the Trail Blazers in the 2nd game of a back-to-back, the #Magic will be without Jase Richardson and Noah Penda.

Orlando will start TyTy Washington Jr., Lester Quinones, Alex Morales, Philip Wheeler and Colin Castleton vs. Portland.

Cam Reddish also remains out.

items.title: New for @orlandosentinel.com: Encouraged to “let it fly,” #Magic's Noah Penda already seeing results at Las Vegas Summer League:
items.author: Jason Beede
items.body_excerpt:
New for @orlandosentinel.com: Encouraged to “let it fly,” #Magic's Noah Penda already seeing results at Las Vegas Summer League:

“I really wanted to improve this part because I know this is what is going to keep me on the floor next year,” he said.

More: www.orlandosentinel.com/2026/07/10/o...

media.title: Encouraged to ‘let it fly,’ Magic’s Noah Penda seeing results at Las Vegas Summer League
media.description: Magic forward Noah Penda knocked down five 3-pointers during Orlando’s Las Vegas Summer League loss to Charlotte. Is that a sign of more progress to come?

items.title: My latest for @orlandosentinel.com: #Magic rookie Izaiyah Nelson, as well as second-year pros Jase Richardson and Noah Penda, will headline Orlando’s summer league roster, that includes Cam Reddish, Ricky Council IV and plenty of Osceola ties.
items.author: Jason Beede
items.body_excerpt:
My latest for @orlandosentinel.com: #Magic rookie Izaiyah Nelson, as well as second-year pros Jase Richardson and Noah Penda, will headline Orlando’s summer league roster, that includes Cam Reddish, Ricky Council IV and plenty of Osceola ties.

More inside: www.orlandosentinel.com/2026/07/02/o...

media.title: Magic summer league roster includes Nelson, Richardson, Penda, among older group
media.description: New Magic assistant coach D.J. Bakker will lead an experienced summer league group in Las Vegas next week.
